module.name: gauge
module.description: A semicircular gauge / dial showing one value within a range, with a needle, the value big in the middle, and an optional caption. For KPIs, utilization, scores.
module.aiSpec:
A semicircular GAUGE (dial) for ONE headline value — utilization, a score, or progress toward a cap. Inline directive, no body. Use it for a single number in context of its range; for many series use @barchart, and for a plain progress bar use @progress.
Parameters: - `value` (required): the real number the needle points to (any number). - `min` / `max`: the two ends of the gauge's RANGE (defaults 0 and 100). The needle and arc fill are computed as (value - min) / (max - min). - `label`: caption shown under the value (default none). - `unit`: suffix appended to the value, e.g. `%`, ` GB` (default none). - `color`: arc + value colour (any CSS colour; default var(--accent-color)). - `zones` (true|false, default false): when true the arc auto-colours green -> amber -> red by how far along the range the value sits (overrides color). - `width`: CSS length capping the dial width (default 260px; shrinks on narrow slides). - `thickness`: arc/track stroke width in px (2-20, default 9). - `showrange` (true|false, default true): show the min/max end labels. - `align` (left|center|right, default center): horizontal placement of the dial.
Example: <!-- @gauge value: 72, max: 100, unit: %, label: CPU load, zones: true, width: 300px -->

param.name: value
param.label: Value
param.desc: The number the needle points to (any real number within min..max).

param.name: min
param.label: Min
param.desc: Low end of the gauge range.

param.name: max
param.label: Max
param.desc: High end of the gauge range.

param.name: unit
param.label: Unit suffix
param.desc: Text appended after the value, e.g. % or GB.

param.name: color
param.label: Arc color
param.desc: Colour of the arc and the big value. Ignored when zones is on.

param.name: zones
param.label: Green/amber/red by value
param.desc: Auto-colour the arc by how far the value is along the range.

param.name: width
param.label: Dial width
param.desc: CSS length capping the dial width, e.g. 260px or 20em.

param.name: thickness
param.label: Arc thickness (px)
param.desc: Stroke width of the arc and track.

param.name: showrange
param.label: Show range labels
param.desc: Show the min and max numbers at the arc ends.

snippet.label: Gauge / dial
snippet.text: <!-- @gauge value: 72, max: 100, unit: %, label: CPU load, zones: true -->
snippet.description: Semicircular dial with needle and big value.
